name: Employer-Provided Adoption Assistance Exclusion

eligibility.description: Available to employees adopting a child; subject to a dollar limit (inflation-adjusted, approx. $16,810 for 2024/2025) and an income phase-out starting at $150,000 (inflation-adjusted).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employees can exclude from gross income qualified adoption expenses paid or reimbursed by their employer under a written adoption assistance program.
